_comment:
Iteration 10: AdaptiveRoutingEnv + log-reward λ=0.05.
Combines the two key innovations:
(1) log-reward that breaks select-all collapse (proven in iter 9)
(2) adaptive state with agent output context (iter 7-8).
epsilon decays to 0.05 over first 50k steps only — critical
for avoiding plateau (lesson from iter 9 full_v1 failure).
Hypothesis: log-reward + context_vec synergy should give
higher F1 than static log-reward (0.888) because agent can
use intermediate outputs to make better stopping decisions.
